title: Help me find this poster for End of Evangelion
display_title: Help me find this poster for End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Help me find this poster for End of Evangelion?             Quote Post by Leliel » Thu Nov 21, 2013 5:58 pm I saw this one poster on Wikipedia for End of Evangelion, and it looked pretty tough. It was one of Unit-01, with some kind of distortion-rainbow effect. I didn't get to save it because they ended up changing it to one of Misato sitting in the LCL. I've been looking on Google, but I can't find it. Can one of you guys help me find it? edit: moved to correct subforum - Xard

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 22, 2013 12:59 am I checked the history of the article going back to 2005 and the characters floating in LCL has always been the infobox image. You don't mean this image from 2.0 do you? [URL=http://imgur.com/pfM921w] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 22, 2013 1:27 am Do you mean rainbow as in goodbye until we meet again , or as in a general color spectrum?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 22, 2013 3:18 pm ^This is a shirt design that Cospa has but I still don't understand the connection to Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 22, 2013 3:21 pm The line? It's from 2.22. If you haven't seen it, I'm not spoiling it for you here.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 22, 2013 4:56 pm I've seen it but just don't remember where. I likely watched the video at 2x speed but will check again as I've found some clues.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Mon Nov 25, 2013 3:53 am Yes I had saved it at some point in time but i'm not sure if I still have it.

[]:             Quote Post by Leliel » Tue Nov 26, 2013 4:44 pm AR-99 wrote: I checked the history of the article going back to 2005

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Nov 26, 2013 7:21 pm Did a crawl through the history of the article going back with archive.org and didn't see such an image. If it was deleted at some point it might not be showing up even in the capture history. There were no captures of the page in 2008. I'm not denying that it doesn't exist though, just saying I am not finding it.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Tue Nov 26, 2013 10:22 pm Ta-da!

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Nov 27, 2013 3:59 am Bigger  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed Nov 27, 2013 7:23 am Bigger is not better

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Nov 27, 2013 7:57 am Print it the same size, but benefit from the higher resolution then!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Nov 27, 2013 12:34 pm Thanks for IDing the image. This is actually a shitajiki that came out in 1997, 0797G as you can see at the bottom of pwhodges' scan. The notation means that it was released in July 1997 and was the 7th Eva shitajiki released that month by Movic (the prior July releases are designated 0797 A-F). That is the reverse side and this is the front side: [URL=http://imgur.com/uLIMCs1] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Dec 02, 2013 2:18 pm I do like it as a poster. It's more psychedelic than anything else that I've seen related to the series, though.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Dec 02, 2013 5:57 pm Just wait... Soon enough there'll be Eva-themed marijuana...

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Dec 03, 2013 1:03 am According to E-Mono , this image does not exist in poster form, so perish the thought.
